title: Lansium aqueum
intro: Lansium aqueum, also known as the langsat fruit, is a tropical plant species native to Southeast Asia and belonging to the family Meliaceae. The health benefits of Lansium aqueum include its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help in reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer, diabetes, and cardiovascular disease. The bioactive constituents of Lansium aqueum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Lansium aqueum is commonly used in herbal preparations such as tea, juice, and extracts, which are often consumed for their potential health benefits and used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
taxonomy: Lansium aqueum is classified within the family Rutaceae and is a species of Lansium, a genus of flowering plants native to Southeast Asia. It is a species of tropical fruit-bearing tree. The Lansium aqueum tree is also known as the langsat or longkong. The langsat tree belongs to the order Sapindales, which comprises a variety of flowering plants, including other fruit-bearing trees. The classification of Lansium aqueum reflects its botanical relationships with other plants in the Rutaceae family.
uses: Lansium aqueum, also known as the langsat fruit, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its high vitamin C content and antioxidants. The fruit has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues. Additionally, the leaves of the langsat tree have been used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The fruit's antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties make it a potential remedy for various infections and inflammatory diseases.
benefits: Lansium aqueum, also known as the langsat, has been used in traditional medicine for various health benefits. preparations: Lansium aqueum, also known as the langsat, is a tropical fruit-bearing tree that has been used in traditional herbal medicine for various purposes.
